task_completion.description: Verify that a URL parameter named 'rid' has been added to the survey.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the LimeSurvey Panel integration settings, a parameter named 'rid' is visible in the list of URL parameters.

task_completion.description: Verify that the survey's End URL is correctly set to the success endpoint.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Survey text elements or Presentation settings, the End URL field contains exactly 'https://api.techsample.com/complete?project=9982&rid={PASSTHRU:rid}'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the End URL is set to automatically load.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The toggle or checkbox for 'Automatically load URL' is set to 'On' or 'Yes' in the survey settings.

task_completion.description: Verify that a quota named 'Screenout: Non-Decision Makers' exists with a limit of 0.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Quotas section, a quota with the name 'Screenout: Non-Decision Makers' and a limit of '0' is listed.

task_completion.description: Verify that the quota is triggered when Q01 is answered 'No'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The quota conditions show that it applies to question 'Q01' with the answer 'No'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the quota's termination URL is correctly set and configured to auto-load.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the quota settings, the URL field contains 'https://api.techsample.com/term?project=9982&rid={PASSTHRU:rid}' and the Autoload URL toggle is set to 'Yes' or 'On'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the LimeSurvey web interface to configure the survey.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the LimeSurvey admin dashboard and configuration forms being filled out in a web browser.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or database clients to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or database management tools (like phpMyAdmin or mysql CLI) are used to insert the configuration directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the expected URLs into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URLs and configurations are entered into the actual LimeSurvey input fields, not a notepad or text editor.
